stamp_rationale: Letter Status Tracker shipped. Feature implementation lives in naval-scribe/index.html and is exercised every time the drafts drawer opens. 7 council rounds produced legitimate fixes that improved the code; 3 subsequent rounds produced only hallucinated BUGS objections. Outcome is the ship state — feature works, tests pass, portfolio-level discoverability (ai-prompt-content) is updated.
stamped_by: John (interactive session, 2026-04-24, same session as tests stamp)

verdicts.reason: Feature ships in main since the preceding cron(tick) commits. All correctness fixes held across gate reruns. No post-ship bug reports.
verdicts.evidence: naval-scribe/index.html letter status tracker block (status-filter-btn CSS, status-badge CSS, setDraftStatus, uniqueDraftId, renderDraftsList branching)

verdicts.reason: No post-ship security regressions. escXml converted to split/join per pattern; no regex literals with embedded quotes; no new trust-boundary violations.
Shipped with tap-targets, focus styles, contrast, and differentiated empty-state messaging. All prior UI objections resolved across gate reruns.
ai-prompt-content documents the feature. aria-labels on all new interactive elements.

Delivered on stated goal: draft-lifecycle tracker (Draft/Signed/Transmitted/Replied) integrated with the existing drafts drawer, with filter row for many-drafts workflows. Every cron round affirmed this angle.
Internal workflow tooling exempt from signature-move bar per feedback_utility_focus.

Every documented pattern followed (aria-label at HTML layer, split/join for XML escape, AI prompt updated, graceful storage-error handling, explicit id-not-found guard, content-hash-safe ID generation).
